resources.string: Play local lossless audio and inspect Android 14+ USB bit-perfect mixer support
This separate player owns the original source. It does not make the system-wide playback-capture path bit-perfect, and it bypasses RootlessZachDSP effects while USB bit-perfect mode is requested.
Format is not verified as lossless
Request exact public USB bit-perfect mixer
Choose and inspect a source first.
No external USB audio output is connected.
The active USB route disconnected. Preferred mixer attributes were cleared.

Android verified an exact preferred mixer for %1$s: %2$d Hz, %3$d channels, %4$s-bit PCM. DSP, fades, gain changes, and player volume changes are disabled. End-to-end DAC bit identity still requires external validation.
No standardized trusted MQA carrier metadata was reported. No MQA decoder is shipped.
An MQA carrier was reported by trusted metadata, but no lawfully licensed decoder plug-in is installed. Carrier passthrough may be possible; no unfold or rendering is claimed.
An authorized decoder reports an active first unfold. Post-decoder PCM is not bit-identical to the original carrier.
